scripts.preflight: pnpm sync-evals && pnpm pack:pss && node src/run-benchmark.mjs --profile official --smoke --dry-run
scripts.eval:smoke: pnpm sync-evals && pnpm pack:pss && node src/run-benchmark.mjs --profile official --smoke
scripts.eval:official: pnpm sync-evals && pnpm pack:pss && node src/run-benchmark.mjs --profile official
scripts.eval:internal: pnpm sync-evals && pnpm pack:pss && node src/run-benchmark.mjs --profile internal
